Get your full savings report

A tailored cost breakdown, time recovery model, and a one-page summary built for your CFO. Sent within the hour.

Your savings report is on its way. You will also receive a note on how to present the case to your CFO. It includes the Nucleus Research proof point and the cost frame that resonates most with economic buyers.

And the cost of guessing

This model counts what GetWhy saves. It does not count what slow research costs you: the launch that misses, the campaign that misfires, the positioning you commit to on a hunch.

That is where research earns its keep.

Benchmarks independently verified by Nucleus Research, Document 2600X, February 2026: "How GetWhy improves marketplace execution at scale." Third-party verified findings: 84% cost-per-interview reduction, 80% time-to-insight acceleration (15 working days to 3), and 80% coordination overhead reduction (20 hours to 4 per study). The dollar and hour figures shown are modelled by applying these benchmarks to your inputs. Complex or highly specialised studies may vary.
